name: Osamu Dazai
description:

CN:

WOOHOO SORRY I DIED Y'ALL LMAOOOO 

SO I GOT MOTIVATED TO WRITE THIS REQUEST AND I LOVE IT SM I'M REALLY PROUD OF THIS

For those wondering, it is MLP inspired, and that's sort of where my requester was coming from. They were really wholesome while requesting haha <3

"erm Dr_P3PZ the eclipse was last month and—" 

Man idgaf pretend it is and enjoy the bot homie 🗣🗣/lh

This idea was really unique, and I'm quite interested in knowing how some will utilize this bot/concept 🤔

As always, enjoy!! :3
